name: Jiin Yeeh Ding Enterprises Corp.
summary: Jiin Yeeh Ding Enterprises Corp. engages in recycling and refining precious metals in Taiwan. It operates professional cleaning and recycling facilities that clean shutters, recycle precious metals, sift disintegrated materials, and prevent pollution, as well as owns recycling and cleaning vehicles. The company serves semiconductor, printer circuit, computer components, electro-optical, passive components, telecommunication, and other industries. Jiin Yeen Ding Enterprise Corp. was founded in 1997 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
